buildingType.cobblemon/pokecenter.descri: A healing station where trainers and their Pokémon can rest and recover after battle.
buildingType.cobblemon/pokemart.descript: A shop stocking Poké Balls, potions and supplies for travelling trainers.
buildingType.cobblemon/daycare.descripti: A pasture where Pokémon can roam freely while their trainer is away. Requires a Pasture Block.
buildingType.cobblemon/training_dojo.des: A sparring ground where village trainers hone their battle skills together.
A large market stocking rare items and supplies. Exclusive to the Cobbleverse experience.
buildingType.cobblemon/trophy_room.descr: A hall of fame displaying the greatest achievements of the village's trainers.
